summary: Tested SEO Dashboard Snapshot composer + frontend SeoDashboardSummary at /admin/seo. Backend pytest 22/22 PASS. Live API 403 anon + 200 admin (190ms warm). Frontend renders dashboard at TOP of /admin/seo with all 6 hero tiles, refresh button, and alerts banner with CTAs. All success criteria met.
critical_code_review_comments: services/seo_dashboard_snapshot.py is well-structured (~295 lines, single responsibility, _safe wrapper for resilience). All MongoDB queries exclude _id. No hardcoded URLs.

Pre-existing console errors observed on /admin (NOT related to this feature): (1) 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AdminDashboard render method — should be fixed in the AdminDashboard component; (2) 'Error fetching conversion stats: DataCloneError' from emergent-main script — third-party, ignore.
seed_data_creation: None — snapshot is read-only on live DB. Backend unit tests use isolated test DBs (test_dashboard_<uuid>) that auto-drop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Dashboard Snapshot feature is complete and verified. Backend: all 22 unit tests pass, live endpoint returns 200 with correct schema in <200ms (warm cache), 403 to anon. Frontend: SeoDashboardSummary mounts above SeoHealthStatusBoard at /admin/seo (verified via bounding box: summary y=457 vs health y=960), renders 6 tile children inside [data-testid='seo-dashboard-tiles']: 4 specific tiles (tile-stealth-clicks, tile-top-product, tile-margin, tile-auto-promote) + 2 tile-empty fallbacks (top-keyword and health) which is correct given live state has no kw clicks and no health checks. Refresh button works. Alerts banner shows 2 bars (low_coverage + auto_promote_idle) with CTAs. Header text 'SEO COMMAND PULSE · THIS WEEK' + Stealth campaign · 0 clicks + window dates renders correctly. Empty-state copy ('No tracked keyword has driven clicks yet', 'Health monitor data unavailable') is appropriate.
